परिचय

A Life Devoted
to Bharat Mata

Born in Rajgarh (Byavara), Madhya Pradesh, Baba Satyanarayan Mourya is a Gold Medalist in Fine Arts from Vikram University, Ujjain. His artistic journey spans painting, caricature, poetry, composition, singing, yoga, and social activism.

Founder of Bharat Bhakti Sansthan, Mumbai and Baba Mourya Project, INC (New Jersey, USA) — he has built a global network of Indian cultural promotion across 25+ countries.

Widely credited (reported) with the iconic slogan "Ram Lala hum aayenge, mandir wahin banayenge" — which galvanized millions during the Ram Janmabhoomi movement.

विक्रम विश्वविद्यालय से स्वर्ण पदक प्राप्त, भारत भक्ति संस्थान के संस्थापक — एक बहुआयामी कलाकार जिन्होंने अपना जीवन भारतीय संस्कृति को समर्पित किया।

प्रमुख कार्यक्रम

Signature Programs

Cultural performances that have inspired millions across India and the world

🪔
भारत माता की आरती
Bharat Mata Ki Aarti
Grand devotional-patriotic aarti performed 1,500+ times worldwide — the signature cultural offering.
📜
राष्ट्रकथा
Rashtrakatha
India's civilizational journey narrated through poetry, art, and music.
🪖
यह देश है वीर जवानों का
Ye Desh Hai Veer Jawano Ka
Heartfelt tribute to India's brave soldiers, performed extensively for defense personnel.
🦁
दुर्गा से दुर्गावती
Durga Se Durgavati
Celebrating the lineage of Indian women warriors from Goddess Durga to Rani Durgavati.
⚔️
शिवजी से शिवाजी
Shivji Se Shivaji
Tracing the spiritual and martial heritage from Lord Shiva to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj.
🌊
गंगावतरण
Gangavataran
Mythological and devotional stage programs performed across India and internationally.

काव्य एवं लेखन

Poetry & Writings

Verses that kindled revolutions and awakened a nation

Ram Bhakti
राम लला हम आयेंगे, मंदिर वहीं बनायेंगे। यह विश्वास हमारा अटल है, यह संकल्प हमारा पक्का है। श्रीराम की महिमा अपार है, जन-जन की पुकार है।
Ram Lala Hum Aayenge
Ram Lala, we will come — the temple shall be built right there. This faith of ours is unshakeable, this resolve of ours is firm. The glory of Shri Ram is boundless, it is the call of every heart.
📝 The iconic verse credited (reported) to Baba Ji during the Ram Janmabhoomi movement.
Desh Bhakti
तू जननी है, तू जीवन है, तू हर पल की अभिलाषा है। तेरी मिट्टी में है जो सोना, वो भारत की परिभाषा है। हिमालय तेरा मुकुट सजाए, गंगा तेरे चरण पखारे।
Bharat Mata
You are mother, you are life, The yearning of every moment. The gold within your soil — That is the definition of Bharat. Himalaya adorns your crown, Ganga washes your feet.
📝 From Baba Ji's patriotic poetry collection.
Veer Sainik
सरहद पर जो पहरा देते, वो वीर जवान हमारे हैं। उनकी शहादत से रोशन है, यह भारत का सितारा है। माँ की लोरी याद करके, तिरंगा थाम लड़ते हैं।
Veer Jawan
Those who stand guard at the border — They are our brave soldiers. By their sacrifice shines bright This star called India. Remembering their mother's lullabies, They fight holding the Tricolor.
📝 Written in tribute to Indian defense personnel.
संपर्क / आमंत्रण
